sections.heading: Product Description
sections.text:
⭐ Studd Muffyn's Sun Kissed Mousse | Bubblegum Blast | SPF70++

If sunscreen feels like a task, you’re using the wrong one. ☀️
The Sun Kissed Mousse – Bubblegum Blast SPF70++ is made to change that—turning daily sun protection into something light, easy, and actually enjoyable.

The first thing you’ll notice is the mousse texture 💗—soft, airy, and smooth. It spreads effortlessly and settles into a non-greasy, no white cast finish, making it perfect for everyday use. Whether you're stepping out for a few minutes or spending hours in the sun, it keeps your skin feeling comfortable, not heavy.

Powered with broad-spectrum UV filters like Titanium Dioxide, Avobenzone, and Ethylhexyl Triazone, it delivers SPF70++ protection while maintaining a breathable feel on the skin.

Achievements 🌟

-> Korean-Inspired Innovation – Advanced mousse sunscreen concept, first time in India

-> First Time in India – Unique texture-led sunscreen experience in its category

-> Loved by 2,00,000+ Users – Trusted and widely used across customers

-> High Adoption Product – Rapidly becoming a daily routine essential

Sun protection. Skin perfection. A Korean innovation crafted for Indian skin.

Net Weight - 50gms (1.76.Oz)

sections.heading: Product Details
sections.text:
• Product Type: Sun Kissed Mousse Sunscreen with SPF70++ for daily sun protection ☀️

• Protection Level: Broad-spectrum coverage to help protect against UVA & UVB exposure

• Texture: Unique airy mousse that feels light, soft, and smooth on application 💗

• Finish: Non-greasy, no white cast, and blends seamlessly into the skin

• Feel on Skin: Lightweight and breathable—comfortable for long hours without heaviness

• Skin Type: Suitable for all skin types, including oily and combination skin

• Usage: Ideal for daily use—indoors, outdoors, or under makeup

• Absorption: Fast-absorbing formula that doesn’t leave residue

• Fragrance: Bubblegum Blast scent for a fun, refreshing experience 💕

sections.heading: Hero Ingredients
sections.text:
• Silicone Base (Cyclopentasiloxane & Dimethicone Crosspolymer) – Gives the mousse its smooth, airy texture and helps it spread effortlessly on the skin 💗

• Titanium Dioxide (Micronized) – A mineral UV filter that helps protect the skin from sun exposure ☀️

• Homosalate & Ethylhexyl Methoxycinnamate – Help absorb UV rays and support daily sun protection

• Ethylhexyl Salicylate & Ethylhexyl Triazone – Boost overall SPF performance and enhance protection against sun damage

• Avobenzone – Known for broad-spectrum protection, helping defend against UVA exposure

• Neopentyl Glycol Diheptanoate – Adds a soft, lightweight feel without making the skin greasy

• C12-15 Alkyl Benzoate – Helps create a smooth, non-sticky finish on the skin

• Cyclopentasiloxane – Enhances spreadability and gives a silky after-feel

• Silica – Helps control excess oil and keeps the skin feeling fresh and matte

• Parfum – Adds the signature Bubblegum Blast fragrance for a fun, refreshing experience 💕

sections.heading: Product Benefits
sections.text:
💕 SPF70++ High Protection – Strong daily shield against sun exposure

💕 Airy Mousse Technology – Lightweight, smooth, and fast-absorbing

💕 Zero White Cast Finish – Blends seamlessly into all skin tones

💕 Non-Sticky Wear – No heaviness, no greasy residue

💕 Bubblegum Blast Experience – A fun, refreshing fragrance
